intro: The cavern opens into a vast vaulted space. Every footstep returns a dozen times over.
title: Echo Chamber
description: Call out into the dark and the returning echoes trace the shape of the tunnels ahead. Listen carefully to map the onward routes, or move on quietly.

1.label: Listen to the echoes
1.tooltip: (+) Reveal the onward routes onto your World Map
1.selected: You call out, and the cavern answers - the echoes sketch the passages ahead...

2.label: Move on quietly
2.selected: You pick your way onward through the dark.

charted: The tunnels ahead are mapped onto your World Map. (Press J to view.)
